title: Test, charge and replace batteries and jump-start vehicles
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Test, charge and replace batteries and jump-start vehicles demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to test, charge and replace batteries and jump-start vehicle

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret technical information and safe operating procedures for testing batteries and equipment1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for the work and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret technical information and safe operating procedures for testing batteries and equipment1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for the work and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret technical information and safe operating procedures for testing batteries and equipment1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for the work and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to test, charge and replace batteries and jump-start vehicle

elements.title: Test battery

pcs.text: Inspect and test battery according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Identify faults and damage on battery cables, terminals and case through visual inspection 2.3 Check and top-up electrolyte levels when required according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 2.4 Clean battery and terminals according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Check battery voltage and load and confirm if battery requires charging, jump-starting or replacement according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect and test battery according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Identify faults and damage on battery cables, terminals and case through visual inspection 2.3 Check and top-up electrolyte levels when required according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 2.4 Clean battery and terminals according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Check battery voltage and load and confirm if battery requires charging, jump-starting or replacement according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect and test battery according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Identify faults and damage on battery cables, terminals and case through visual inspection 2.3 Check and top-up electrolyte levels when required according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 2.4 Clean battery and terminals according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Check battery voltage and load and confirm if battery requires charging, jump-starting or replacement according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Test battery

elements.title: Charge battery

pcs.text: Obtain and interpret battery charging information 3.2 Prepare tools and equipment for charging battery according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Check and top-up electrolyte levels when required according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.4 Identify battery charge rate and connect battery charger to battery according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.5 Charge battery according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.6 Turn off and disconnect battery charger according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements and confirm electrolyte levels are in line with manufacturer or other required specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and interpret battery charging information 3.2 Prepare tools and equipment for charging battery according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Check and top-up electrolyte levels when required according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.4 Identify battery charge rate and connect battery charger to battery according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.5 Charge battery according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.6 Turn off and disconnect battery charger according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements and confirm electrolyte levels are in line with manufacturer or other required specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and interpret battery charging information 3.2 Prepare tools and equipment for charging battery according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Check and top-up electrolyte levels when required according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.4 Identify battery charge rate and connect battery charger to battery according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.5 Charge battery according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.6 Turn off and disconnect battery charger according to manufacturer or other required specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements and confirm electrolyte levels are in line with manufacturer or other required specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Charge battery

elements.title: Carry out jump-start procedures

pcs.text: Identify and confirm battery voltage is in line with manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements to begin jump-start procedures4.2 Connect jumper leads in sequence and polarity according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirement4.3 Jump-start vehicle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 4.4 Disconnect leads in sequence and polarity according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm battery voltage is in line with manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements to begin jump-start procedures4.2 Connect jumper leads in sequence and polarity according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirement4.3 Jump-start vehicle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 4.4 Disconnect leads in sequence and polarity according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm battery voltage is in line with manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements to begin jump-start procedures4.2 Connect jumper leads in sequence and polarity according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirement4.3 Jump-start vehicle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 4.4 Disconnect leads in sequence and polarity according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirement.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Carry out jump-start procedures

elements.title: Remove and replace battery

pcs.text: Connect power source memory back-up device according to workplace procedures 5.2 Disconnect battery terminals according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 5.3 Remove battery from vehicle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 5.4 Choose replacement battery according to electrical and physical specifications and measurements of vehicle or machinery5.5 Replace and secure battery according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 5.6 Re-connect and tighten battery terminals according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements5.7 Carry out post-replacement testing of battery charging system according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Connect power source memory back-up device according to workplace procedures 5.2 Disconnect battery terminals according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 5.3 Remove battery from vehicle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 5.4 Choose replacement battery according to electrical and physical specifications and measurements of vehicle or machinery5.5 Replace and secure battery according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 5.6 Re-connect and tighten battery terminals according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements5.7 Carry out post-replacement testing of battery charging system according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Connect power source memory back-up device according to workplace procedures 5.2 Disconnect battery terminals according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 5.3 Remove battery from vehicle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 5.4 Choose replacement battery according to electrical and physical specifications and measurements of vehicle or machinery5.5 Replace and secure battery according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 5.6 Re-connect and tighten battery terminals according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements5.7 Carry out post-replacement testing of battery charging system according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Remove and replace battery

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 6.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures6.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 6.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures6.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 6.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures6.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Complete work processes
